title: MBE - Absolumentium [RENEWED]
description: This mod adds Absolumentium, a powerful endgame ore made to beat the Warden or even stronger modded bosses. It’s balanced and requires Netherite gear first before you can upgrade to Absolumentium equipment!
body:
### Where to find Absolumentium ores?

You can only find it in the End, between Y-levels 36 and 76. Its rarity is very high — you’ll need to be lucky to find it naturally, but don’t worry: it can also be found inside chests in structures added by the mod.

### How to craft Absolumentium armor and tools?

First, you need to find an Absolumentium Smithing Template, which can only be found in chests inside the mod’s structures.
It works like the Netherite upgrade — you can duplicate it with a crafting recipe.
To upgrade a piece (using a Smithing Table):

Absolumentium Smithing Upgrade Template
The Netherite armor/tool (or classic bow) you want to upgrade
Absolumentium

### New enchantments:

Double Jump: On Absolumentium Boots only. Lets you double jump up to 2.5 blocks high by pressing your jump key twice (default: SPACE).
 

Dash: On Absolumentium Boots only. Lets you dash in the direction you’re looking, enough to jump over an 8-block gap. Has a 2-second cooldown after each use (default key: R).
 

Infinite Breathing: On Absolumentium Helmet only. Lets you breathe underwater indefinitely.
 

Storm Caller I–III: On Absolumentium Sword only. Calls lightning on all threats nearby when right-clicking.
It burns mobs hit but does not ignite blocks. Many friendly entities are unaffected (villagers, dogs, animals, etc.).
It’s a powerful enchantment with multiple levels:
 

I: Strikes mobs in a 20-block radius (10 front, 10 back), deals 5 damage, burns for 5 seconds (10s cooldown).
II: Strikes mobs in a 40-block radius (20 front, 20 back), deals 15 damage, burns for 10 seconds (5s cooldown).
III: Strikes mobs in a 60-block radius (30 front, 30 back), deals 30 damage, burns for 15 seconds (4s cooldown).
 

Note: Dash and Double Jump can be used together on the same boots.

### Other info:

3 advancements to unlock
The mod is translated in 20 languages: English (default), French (fr_fr, fr_be, fr_ca), German (de_de), Spanish (es_es, es_mx), Italian (it_it), Japanese (ja_jp), Portuguese (pt_pt, pt_br), Dutch (nl_nl, nl_be), Turkish (tr_tr), Swedish (sv_se), Russian (ru_ru), Polish (pl_pl), Chinese (zh_cn), Indonesian (id_id), Korean (ko_kr)
